warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Scap Pull Up
15 Plate I Y T
15 Plate Shoulder Press
15 Push Ups
30sec Cobra Stretch

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
5x5 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E3MOM 21min
BUILD 2 Sets
00:00 5 @ 50 + 60%
03:00 5 @ 70%
HOLD 5 Sets
06:00 5 @ 75%
09:00 5 @ 75%
12:00 5 @ 75%
15:00 5 @ 75%
18:00 5 @ 75%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
4 Rounds for Time
15 Double Dumbbell Bench Press @22.5/15kg
50 Double Unders
12 V-ups
5 Bar Muscle Ups
Scale BMU to Banded Bar Muscle Ups
Rx+ 10 x GHD Sit ups

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
Max Reps (aim to keep the same reps throughout each set)
Aim for 1 more rep than last week

hypertrophy.reasoning: Bench press and dumbbell presses heavily tax chest/triceps; accessory work targets pull-based muscles and posterior chain balance.

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 5 by 5 at 75 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 15 Double Dumbbell Bench Press @22.5/15kg, 50 Double Unders, 12 V-ups, 5 Bar Muscle Ups, Scale BMU to Banded Bar Muscle Ups. For hypertrophy, focus on back, rear delts, biceps.
